summary: Testing 4 bug fixes in iteration 173. Backend tests (8/8 passed): Anomaly check streak computation, Trade journal not truncated (max_tokens=800), Shared streak utility verified. Frontend: Timezone DST fix verified (uses Intl API). ISSUE FOUND: NotificationPanel.jsx has all required features but is NOT wired into Header.jsx - Header uses old NotificationSheet instead.

critical.issue: NotificationPanel.jsx has all required features (tabs, consolidation, action buttons) but is NOT imported or used in Header.jsx. Header.jsx still uses the old NotificationSheet component which lacks these features.
critical.selector: Header.jsx line 14 imports NotificationSheet, line 271 renders <NotificationSheet />
critical.fix: In /app/frontend/src/components/layout/Header.jsx, replace import { NotificationSheet } with import { NotificationPanel } and replace <NotificationSheet /> with <NotificationPanel />

action_items: HIGH PRIORITY: Wire NotificationPanel into Header.jsx - Replace NotificationSheet with NotificationPanel import and usage
File to edit: /app/frontend/src/components/layout/Header.jsx line 14 and line 271
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationPanel.jsx was created with all required features but never wired into the application
The fix is simple: change import and component usage in Header.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 173 tested 4 bug fixes: 1) Anomaly streak fix - VERIFIED using compute_trading_streak utility, 2) Trade journal truncation fix - VERIFIED max_tokens=800, 3) Timezone DST fix - VERIFIED uses Intl API not hardcoded offsets, 4) NotificationPanel - CODE EXISTS but NOT WIRED into Header.jsx. The NotificationPanel.jsx has tabs (tab-unread, tab-read, tab-all), consolidation (consolidateByType function), and action buttons (notification-action-*) but Header.jsx still imports and uses NotificationSheet instead.
